config.script:
try:
		area = self.session.custom.CurrentAreaId
		system.perspective.print("inside the code")
		line = self.session.custom.CurrentLineId
		workStation = self.view.params.station
		serialNumber=self.view.params.serialNumber
		orderNumber=self.view.params.order
		bom =self.view.params.bom
		createdBy= self.session.custom.loggedInUserId
		operatorID= self.session.custom.operatorID
		
		#Defect Category
		defectCategory=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("cntDefectOptions").getChild("cntDefectCategory").getChild("drpDefectCatergory").props.value
		system.perspective.print("defectCategory: %s"%defectCategory)
		
		#Defect Name
		defectName = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("cntDefectOptions").getChild("cntDefectName").getChild("drpDefectName").props.value
		system.perspective.print("defectName: %s"%defectName)
		
		#Defect Subname
		defectListTable = self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("tblSubDefectName").props.data
		system.perspective.print("defectListTable: %s"%defectListTable)
		
		selectedRow=self.parent.parent.parent.getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("FlexContainer").getChild("tblSubDefectName").props.selection.selectedRow
		system.perspective.print("selectedRow: %s"%selectedRow)
		if(len(defectListTable) > 0):
			for row in range(len(defectListTable)):
				isSelect = defectListTable[row]['Select']
				if(str(isSelect) == 'True' or str(isSelect) == '1'):
					DefectSubname= defectListTable[row]['Defect SubName']
					comment= defectListTable[row]['Comments']
					params= {'Area':area ,'Line':line,'Comment':comment, 'WorkStation':workStation, 'SerialNumber':serialNumber, 'OrderNo':orderNumber, 'CreatedBy':createdBy, 'BOM':bom, 'DefectCategory':defectCategory, 'DefectName' :defectName, 'DefectSubName': DefectSubname,'OperatorId':operatorID}
					system.perspective.print("parameters in confirm button%s"%params)
					insertDetails = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/insertDefectsQuality',params)
		system.perspective.sendMessage('RefreshDefectCheck')
		system.perspective.sendMessage('refreshQGdefectTab')
		system.perspective.closePopup('')
		state = 'Warning'
		message = "Defect added for serial number %s"%(serialNumber)
		Project_VECV.PopUp.Alerts.showAlert(str(state), str(state.capitalize()), str(message), "true", "Okay", "", "", "", "", "closePopup", "closePopup", "closePopup","","","","")
		try:
		    stationName=workStation
		    state='Info'
		    userName=self.session.custom.loggedInUser
		    ipAddress=self.session.custom.currentIpAddress
		    Project_VECV.Audit.Logs.logUpload(stationName,state,userName,ipAddress,message)
		except:
			system.perspective.print("Logging Failed -=> stationName: %s, userName: %s"%stationName %userName)
	except exception as e:
			system.perspective.print("In defect Save button Error= %s"%e)

system.perspective.print("In sub defect")
	valueToSet = event.value
	system.perspective.print("Value: %s"%valueToSet)
	self.props.data[event.row][event.column] = valueToSet
	system.perspective.print("event.row: %s"%self.props.data[event.row][event.column])

messageHandlers.script:
"""
		Written By: Niladri Banerjee
		Written Date: 10/06/2024
		Purpose: Refresh table to show defects. 
	"""
	# implement your handler here
	serialNumber = self.view.params.serialNumber
	orderNumber =self.view.params.order
	workStationName = self.view.params.station
	params= {'SerialNumber':serialNumber,'OrderNumber':orderNumber,'WorkStationName':workStationName}
	refreshedData = system.db.runNamedQuery('Project_VECV/Quality/getDefect',(params))
	refreshfulfilDataList=[]
	for row in range(len(refreshedData)):
		defectName = refreshedData[row]['DefectName']
		comments=refreshedData[row]['Comments']
		refreshfulfilDataList.append({"DefectName":defectName,"Comments":comments})		
		system.perspective.print('refreshfulfilDataList'+str(refreshfulfilDataList))
	self.props.data=refreshfulfilDataList

# implement your handler here
	self.refreshBinding("props.data")
	self.props.selection.selectedRow=-1
	self.props.selection.selectedColumn=''
